option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: $created = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:8080/inventory -ContentType application/json -Body (Get-Content "$PROJECT_DIR$/docs/samples/inventory-report.sample.json" -Raw); $dashboard = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/ -UseBasicParsing; $detail = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/reports/$($created.id)" -UseBasicParsing; $delete = Invoke-WebRequest -Method Delete -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/reports/$($created.id)" -UseBasicParsing; [pscustomobject]@{ CreatedId = $created.id; DashboardHasControlPanel = $dashboard.Content.Contains('Local control panel'); DetailHasJson = $detail.Content.Contains('<pre>'); DeleteStatus = $delete.StatusCode } | ConvertTo-Json
